message:
fix(time,sync): fail-closed completion tracking for TimeoutFuture and Notified

TimeoutFuture: add completed and timed_out fields. After poll returns
Ready (either Ok or Err(Elapsed)), subsequent polls panic via assert.
The timed_out flag enables reset()/reset_after() to re-arm a timed-out
future for reuse (the only valid reset case), while repolling a
success-completed future remains a hard error. Both poll() (pinned)
and poll_with_time() (unpinned) paths are covered. Clone impl
preserves both fields. Add regression tests for:
- repoll after success panics (both poll paths)
- repoll after timeout panics until reset re-arms
- simulated_timeout_scenario: initialize CURRENT_TIME to avoid
  flakiness from stale thread-local state

Notified (sync/notify.rs): change Done state from returning
Poll::Ready(()) to panic!("Notified polled after completion"). A
Notified future represents a single notification event; repolling
after consumption is a logic error. Add regression tests for repoll
after notify_one wakeup and after stored-notification consumption.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
